stats.description: of young people between the ages of 12 and 17 have been bullied online
of young people have witnessed online bullying but did not intervene
of students who experienced cyberbullying said it affected their ability to learn and feel safe at school
teens report being threatened online, and most never tell a parent or trusted adult

mission: ToneSafe helps you understand the real impact of words. Every message you send has the power to build someone up — or tear them down. By analyzing language patterns and building empathy, ToneSafe teaches better communication, one message at a time.
